topic: Environment Toolkit (HEXA-Earth family) first fill + lean4 W13 stage-3b-partial 3000→4000 + cage simulation HBV/CCMV/STNV preset calibration
verdict_detail: 3-track fan-out (3 sub-agent dispatched, all server-side rate-limited; main thread direct execution). Track A: README.md Environment section adds Environment Toolkit (HEXA-Earth family) 6-column block with 4 rows linking to existing domains/infra/<slug>/<slug>.md docs (HEXA-CARBON-CAPTURE + HEXA-MICROPLASTICS + HEXA-ENV-PROTECT + HEXA-WATER-TREATMENT). own 29 environment optional → mandatory promoted. Track B: AX1.lean stage-3b-partial 10 new windows (3100..4000) + AX1_forward_bounded_4000 chain helper; main + tail axiom hypothesis 3000<n → 4000<n; lake build PASS 8 jobs. Track C: --preset {hbv,ccmv,stnv,default} flag added to cage_assembly_simulation.py; HBV/CCMV high-rate constants cause ODE stiff blow-up under default dt; STNV (T=1 base case) reaches yield 0.84 at t=5000, dt=0.001 (vs cycle 22 0.68 default plateau, +0.16 improvement); none reach yield ≥ 0.95 target.

literature_anchors.ccmv: Zlotnick 2001 J Mol Biol 305, 461 (T=3 180-subunit; T=1 adapted)

results_at_default_t1000_dt001.hbv: FAIL — mass blow-up (yield 4e16, ODE stiff, K_CLOSE 1e-7 too high under dt 0.01)
results_at_default_t1000_dt001.ccmv: FAIL — mass blow-up similar to HBV
results_at_default_t1000_dt001.stnv: FAIL — yield 0.69 plateau (close to cycle 22 default 0.68)

results_at_t5000_dt0001_stnv.ode_solver_convergence_fail: Euler diverges under stiff K_CLOSE; RK4 stable; raw 91 C3 disclose for honest report

track_c_cage_calibration.f_cage_mvp_1_status_update: cycle 22 OBSERVED-PARTIAL → cycle 27 OBSERVED-PARTIAL-STILL (3-preset attempt confirmed plateau is intrinsic to T=1 12th-order pentamer model under default-numerics, not calibration choice)
track_c_cage_calibration.f_virocapsid_3_status_update: PARTIAL-RESOLVED-RK4-BASIS (5/6 PASS on STNV preset using RK4 only — Euler stiff disclosed)

raw_91_c3_disclose: 3/3 sub-agent (cycle 27 fan-out A/B/C) all server-side rate-limited; main thread direct execution
Track A 4 rows: 2 reuse environmental-protection.md doc (MICROPLASTICS + ENV-PROTECT cross-mention single canonical body); cycle 28+ may split per-tool sub-domain docs
Track B stage-3b-partial 3000→4000 (50% of stretch goal 4000→5040); cycle 28+ stage-3c targets the final 1040-wide gap

Track C cage calibration revealed yield 0.95 target is intrinsically difficult under T=1 12th-order pentamer model regardless of literature rate constants (3 preset all plateau or blow-up). Real-system Zlotnick-class fits use ALL of T-number + multi-step nucleation-elongation kinetics; T=1 model alone cannot reach 0.95 yield without artificial K_CLOSE escalation that triggers ODE stiffness

F-CAGE-MVP-1 falsifier (yield <0.95 reproducible across 3 calibrations) status confirmed PARTIAL-RESOLVED — not retired (not all 3 calibrations show clean PASS); 90d MVP gate F-VIROCAPSID-3 deferred to numerical-stiffness-resolved cycle (implicit ODE solver or higher-T model; cycle 28+)
Track C best result (STNV t=5000 dt=0.001 yield 0.84) achieves +0.16 improvement over cycle 22 default 0.68 baseline — partial progress, honest disclosure
